hero.title_start: Solve the Language of Your Soil
hero.subtitle: This project is an academic study aiming to increase agricultural efficiency by combining IoT sensor data and advanced machine learning algorithms.

features.label: PROJECT ARCHITECTURE
features.title: Holistic Field Management
features.subtitle: We offer technologies that allow you to make strategic decisions for the future, not just instant data.

iot.title: IoT Integration
iot.desc: Monitor soil moisture, temperature and pH values instantly 24/7 with our ESP32 based sensors.

recommendation.title: Smart Crop Recommendation
recommendation.desc: Our multi-label ML models offer the most suitable product portfolio such as Tomato, Pepper or Corn according to your field's characteristics.

xai.title: Explainable Analysis (XAI)
xai.desc: AI is no longer a 'black box'. We explain why the model recommends that product with transparent graphics.

steps.title: Planning Agricultural Future in 3 Steps
steps.subtitle: We provide access to scientific data by simplifying complex analysis processes.

step1.title: Field Data Entry
step1.desc: The location of the field is selected on the map and IoT sensors are paired.

step2.title: Data Collection & Processing
step2.desc: The system automatically combines sensor data and satellite-derived soil data (SoilGrids).

step3.title: Recommendation Report
step3.desc: A detailed report explaining which crop should be planted and why is presented.

research.title: Academic Research Project
research.desc: Solara is a student project aiming to provide technological infrastructure for sustainable agriculture practices.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Solara Project. Akdeniz University Computer Engineering.
footer.tubitak: Developed within the scope of TÜBİTAK 2209-A.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Please sign in to continue.
login.brand_subtitle: A new generation management panel that processes your IoT sensor data with artificial intelligence to ensure you get maximum efficiency from your field.
login.error_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

register.brand_subtitle: Increase your productivity with modern agricultural technologies. Create your account in seconds.
register.feature_1_desc: Learn your field's needs with artificial intelligence.
register.feature_2_desc: Discover the most suitable crops for your climate and soil structure.
register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Enter your details to start using Solara immediately.

verify.brand_subtitle_verify: Secure your account by confirming your email. This ensures you have full access to all Solara features.
verify.brand_subtitle_forgot: Don't worry — we'll send a verification code to your email so you can regain access to your account.
verify.feature_1_desc: 6-digit codes expire quickly for maximum security.
verify.feature_2_desc: Regain access to your account in seconds.
verify.subtitle_verify: Enter your email address and we'll send you a verification code.
verify.subtitle_forgot: Enter your email address and we'll send you a recovery code.
verify.error_request: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
verify.error_confirm: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
verify.reset_subtitle: Enter your new password below. Make sure it meets the requirements.
verify.reset_error_failed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
verify.reset_success_message: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome, current status of your fields.
dashboard.add_field_desc: Define a new IoT device and field to the system.
dashboard.alert_msg: Low moisture in Antalya Greenhouse. Irrigation recommended.

add_field.title: Define New Field
add_field.map_info: Polygon data will be the basis for satellite and SoilGrids analysis.
add_field.lab_alert: If you have a recent laboratory analysis, you can enter the values. Values left blank will be automatically filled by the system based on your location (SoilGrids).
add_field.success_desc: {{name}} will be added to the system and the soil analysis process will begin.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences.
settings.delete_account_desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated fields. This action cannot be undone.
settings.delete_code_sent: A 6-digit verification code has been sent to your email to confirm deletion.
settings.delete_request_failed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again later.
settings.delete_confirm_desc: Please enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your email to permanently delete your account.
settings.name: First Name

validation.location_required: Please draw your field boundary on the map (minimum 3 points)

map.click_hint_few: Click on the satellite map to mark your field corners. Minimum 3 points.
map.click_hint_enough: Click "Finish" to lock the polygon, or keep adding points.
map.status_add_points: Click map to add points ({{count}}/3 min)

field_details.title: Field Details
field_details.subtitle: Real-time IoT Insights
field_details.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and will remove all associated data.
field_details.unpair_desc: Are you sure you want to unpair "{{id}}"? You will stop receiving telemetry data from this device.
field_details.mac_helper: Enter the MAC address snippet found on the sticker of your ESP32 device.

ai.modal_subtitle: Choose a scenario and configure the parameters below.
ai.range_info: Analyzes your IoT sensor data (or local weather logs as fallback) for the date range you specify to determine the best crop to plant.
ai.future_info: Projects the best crop for a future season by averaging historical climatology data for the selected months from your weather records.
ai.whatif_info: Override the climatology baseline with custom values to simulate drought, heatwave, or other conditions.
ai.source_iot: Based on IoT sensor data for the selected range.
ai.source_weather_log: Based on local weather log data (IoT unavailable for the selected period).
ai.source_climatology: Based on historical climatology averages from local weather records.
ai.no_recommendations: No crops met the confidence threshold for this scenario. Try a different date range or scenario.
ai.empty_desc: No analysis has been run yet for this field. Click the button below to get your first AI crop prediction.

crop_guide.title: Crop Guide
crop_guide.subtitle: Browse crop profiles and care instructions.
crop_guide.search_placeholder: Search crops by name, scientific name, or description...
crop_guide.empty: No crop guide matched your search.
crop_guide.not_found_desc: No crop guide matches this link.
crop_guide.no_data: No data available for this section.

fields_page.search_ph: Search by field name or soil type...
